title: Stage 4 overview: base view plus overlay API
description: Add render(model,{baseView,overlays}) path so overview base view and auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation overlays combine without reparsing.
triage_notes: Stage 4 DONE. Completion: render(model,{baseView,overlays}) coexists with legacy view API; overview and zone render from the normalized model; auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation overlays combine without reparsing; permission overlay synthesizes principal-resource annotation edges; RenderResult supports setBaseView/setOverlays/toggleOverlay/destroy. Success: 03 view acceptance for overview + overlay combinations is covered by tests, legibility invariants rely on existing layout/routing tests, and warnings remain non-blocking. Verification: typecheck, test (82), build, organization-verify 22/22. Engine API work is split to TASK-005.
